zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Bothumsell於1308年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾波坦斯亞爾時，她的父親Sir Nicholas de Bothumsell Kt43歲，母親Milicent de Beckering32歲。她和John Markham至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1322年在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾馬卡姆 克林頓享年14歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Bothumsell was born in 1308, in Bothamsall, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Nicholas de Bothumsell Kt, was 43 and her mother, Milicent de Beckering, was 32. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with John Markham. She died in 1322, in Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 14, and was buried in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Bothumsell est née en 1308, à Bothamsall, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Nicholas de Bothumsell Kt, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Milicent de Beckering, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec John Markham. Elle est décédée en 1322, à Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 14 ans, et a été enterrée à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Bothumsell 1308 in Bothamsall, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Nicholas de Bothumsell Kt 43 und ihre Mutter Milicent de Beckering 32. Sie hatte mit John Markham mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1322 im Alter von 14 Jahren in Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Bothumsellが1308年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアボサムサルで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas de Bothumsell Ktは43歳，母Milicent de Beckeringは32歳であった。彼女はJohn Markhamとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1322年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアマークハム クリントンで14歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Bothumsell(이)가 1308년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 벗함사에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Nicholas de Bothumsell Kt(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Milicent de Beckering(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 John Markham(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1322년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 마카 클린턴에서 14세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Bothumsell родилась в 1308 г. в местности ботамсалл, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Nicholas de Bothumsell Kt было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Milicent de Beckering, 32. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от John Markham. Она умерла в 1322 г. в местности мархам клинтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 14 лет и была похоронена в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
